schema:name: Time-Series Data Synthesis Product
schema:description: Synthesis of (presently 12) ship-based biogeochemical time-series stations.

schema:about.schema:name: HOT ALOHA Niskin Bottles
schema:about.schema:description: Monthly measurements of the thermohaline structure, water column chemistry, and primary production were collected at station ALOHA as part of the HOT program.

schema:about.schema:name: CARIACO Niskin Bottles
schema:about.schema:description: ################ measurements of the thermohaline structure, water column chemistry, and primary production were collected at station ALOHA as part of the HOT program.

schema:citation: Lange et al. (2023): A ship-based biogeochemical time-series data product

schema:provider.legalName: Biological & Chemical Oceanography Data Management Office
schema:provider.schema:name: BCO-DMO

schema:funder.schema:name: H2020-EU.3.2. - SOCIETAL CHALLENGES - Food security, sustainable agriculture and forestry, marine, maritime and inland water research, and the bioeconomy

schema:variableMeasured.schema:name: Latitude
schema:variableMeasured.schema:description: Latitude where water samples were collected; north is positive. Latitude is a geographic coordinate which refers to the angle from a point on the Earth's surface to the equatorial plane

schema:variableMeasured.schema:name: NITRAT_FLAG_W
schema:variableMeasured.schema:description: Nitrate quality flag; based on a PI established code; identifies a problem/quality issue with sample(s) from a given water bottle or single observation

schema:variableMeasured.schema:name: NITRAT_BPf
schema:variableMeasured.schema:description: Nitrate Best-Practice Flag: Indicates the extent to which Best-Practices have been followed (Lange et al. 2023)

schema:variableMeasured.schema:name: NITRAT_A
schema:variableMeasured.schema:description: Nitrate accuracy based on comparisons to reference material

schema:variableMeasured.schema:name: NITRAT_P
schema:variableMeasured.schema:description: Nitrate precision based on comparisons to reference material

schema:subjectOf.schema:name: Metadata record for: Time-Series Data Synthesis Product
schema:subjectOf.schema:description: Adapted from WHOI METS-RCN schema.org JSON-LD metadata for a ship-based biogeochemical time series synthesis product covering 12 stations (ALOHA, CARIACO, KNOT, K2, CVOO, Munida, RADCO, GIFT, DYFAMED, Irminger Sea, Iceland Sea, OWSM). Converted to CDIF discovery profile: property names prefixed with schema: namespace, @context converted to CDIF prefix declarations. 2026-04-08: Removed empty @id values from schema:identifier PropertyValue and schema:creator Person (empty @id resolves to document base URI during JSON-LD expansion, causing node merge during framing).
